description: Load a CSV, run the system preflight, load TimesFM 2.5, forecast every numeric column over HORIZON steps, and write point forecasts plus q10/q20/median/q80/q90 prediction intervals as JSON.
rules: INPUT_CSV and HORIZON are required; DATE_COL and VALUE_COLS are optional
VALUE_COLS is a comma-separated column list; if empty, all numeric columns are forecast
real inference requires timesfm + torch installed and ~800 MB of HuggingFace weights
without timesfm/torch the porter degrades to an empty {} report (exit 0) so the contract holds
usage: Set INPUT_CSV and HORIZON; optionally DATE_COL / VALUE_COLS. Output: forecasts.json mapping each series to forecast + lower_90/lower_80/median/upper_80/upper_90 arrays.
limitation: Needs timesfm[torch] and network access for first-run weight download; offline it produces an empty report. Quantile index 0 is the mean (not q0): q10=idx1 ... q90=idx9.
